name: @galactica-net/overcast-private-stablecoin
description: Aztec Noir token contract for private, compliance-aware transfers (forked from Aztec private_token_contract).

scripts.compile:deps: (cd ../generic_proxy && aztec compile) && mkdir -p target && cp ../generic_proxy/target/generic_proxy-GenericProxy.json target/
scripts.deploy::devnet: NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 AZTEC_ENV=devnet yarn node --loader ts-node/esm scripts/deploy_contract.ts
scripts.test:js: rm -rf store/pxe && NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' yarn exec jest --no-cache --runInBand --config jest.integration.config.json
